    Peer-reviewed research papers

    See my Google Scholar profile for more details!

    2026

    • Sear, D., M. Peaple, P. Langdon, D. T. Skinner, M. Joshi, A. J. Matthews, C. Hipkiss, T. J. Osborn, G. N. Inglis, and J. Sheffield (2026) How did a changing climate in the tropical South Pacific contribute to the eastward migration and settlement of Polynesia? Journal of Pacific Archaeology, 16(2), 5. 
      https://doi.org/10.70460/jpa.v16i2.399

    • Peaple, M., Skinner, D.T., Inglis, G.N., Joshi, M., Langdon, P., Matthews, A.J., Osborn, T.J., Scaife, R., Meyer, J.-Y., & Sear, D. (2026) Cooler and drier climate in the South–Central Pacific during the last glacial period. Communications Earth & Environment, 7, 408. 
      https://doi.org/10.1038/s43247-026-03356-8

    2025

    • Skinner, D.T., Peaple, M., Inglis, G.N., Joshi, M., Langdon, P., Matthews, A.J., Osborn, T.J. & Sear, D. (2025) Ocean variability drives a millennial-scale shift in South Pacific hydroclimate. Communications Earth & Environment, 6 pp. 679.
       https://doi.org/10.1038/s43247-025-02676-5

    • Skinner, D.T., Matthews, A.J. & Stevens, D.P. (2025) Decadal variability of Madden–Julian oscillation teleconnections in a coupled climate model. Quarterly Journal of the Royal Meteorological Society, 151(773) pp. e5071.
       https://doi.org/10.1002/qj.5071

    2023

    • Skinner, D. T., A. J. Matthews, and D. P. Stevens (2023) Decadal variability of the extratropical response to the Madden–Julian Oscillation, Geophysical Research Letters, 50 pp. e2023GL104576.
       https://doi.org/10.1029/2023GL104576

    2022

    • Skinner, D. T., A. J. Matthews, and D. P. Stevens (2022) North Atlantic Oscillation response to the Madden–Julian Oscillation in a coupled climate model, Weather, 77(6) pp. 201–205. 
      https://doi.org/10.1002/wea.4215

    Other publications

    2026

    • Skinner, D.T., H. Heidemann, and Y. Li (2026) CMIP Community Workshop 2026, Weather. https://doi.org/10.1002/wea.70084

    2024

    • Skinner, D. T. (2024) Weather in my life: Daniel Skinner, Weather, 79(6) pp. 185. https://doi.org/10.1002/wea.4580

    2023

    • Skinner, D. T., and H. Mallinson (2023) Spotlight on the Youth and Early Career Special Interest Group, Weather, 78(6) pp. 164–165.
    • Bloomfield, H., M. Wright, and D. T. Skinner (2023) How the Royal Meteorological Society is engaging industry with Weather and Climate Science, The Geographer (Royal Scottish Geographical Society), Spring 2023 pp. 34–35.
    • Wright, M., D. T. Skinner, H. Bloomfield and H. Mallinson (2023) RMetS Climate Change Forum 2022: A Vision for 2050 and Implications for Action, Weather, 78(4) pp. 117–119.
